verdict.description: Cheap classifier outcome from prose plus git history. Never asserts true_positive from the reproduction running; this skill does not execute.

reason.description: One paragraph of justification, citing the file, line, and any commit SHA that supports the decision.

adjusted_severity.description: Optional severity override using the precondition rubric. Omit to leave the original severity in place.

adjusted_severity_reason.description: One line explaining the adjustment. Required when adjusted_severity is set.
